THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEMBRENO, RAQUEL MEMBRENO, JUAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2715 FOLSOM $6,000.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,000.00, LEASE FORFEITED, MONEY JDMT ENFORCEABLE ONLY BY LIEN AGAINST SC 	61586. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN FEES & COSTS; EXCEPT IF NEED ACTION TO ENFORCE TERMS, PREVAILING PARTY GETS FEES & COSTS. SEE JDMT AT LENGTH FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
